channel.title: People on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in People on Detention Pipeline

item.title: Tae D. Johnson — Former ICE Acting Director, Now Sabot Consulting
item.description: Former Acting ICE Director (31 years ICE/INS) now at Sabot Consulting, advising counties on building IGSA detention facilities. GAO found his service violated the Federal Vacancies Reform Act.

item.title: Antoine McCord — DHS CIO, Former Anduril Employee with Active Equity
item.description: DHS CIO Antoine McCord is a former Anduril employee holding active Anduril equity. Paired with ex-Palantir OMB CIO Barbaccia, both Thiel-network alumni control federal tech procurement.

item.title: David Venturella
item.description: Spent 12 years at GEO Group ($6M+ pay), now runs ICE detention contracting with an ethics waiver. Since his return, GEO won $520M in new contracts and reported 700% profit increase.

item.title: Edward D'Alelio — Blue Owl Capital Director, Former Trump Entertainment Resorts Board
item.description: Blue Owl Capital director who previously served on the Trump Entertainment Resorts board, connecting the private equity firm profiting from ICE warehouses to the Trump business network.

item.title: Edward Forst — GSA Administrator, Former Goldman Sachs AND Deutsche Bank Employee
item.description: GSA Administrator and former Goldman Sachs partner whose agency’s procurement role was bypassed via WEXMAC-TITUS. All $1.074B in warehouse purchases closed after his Dec 2025 swearing-in.

item.title: John Russell McGranahan — Former GSA General Counsel with Blue Owl Investments
item.description: Former GSA General Counsel (through Nov 2025) who held Blue Owl Capital investments while at the agency that normally brokers federal real estate. Blue Owl sold Tremont PA for $119M.

item.title: Daniel A. Bible
item.description: Former ICE ERO deputy director who left days before the 2024 election to become GEO Group EVP. GEO invested $70M in detention expansion weeks after his hire, suggesting advance knowledge.

item.title: Daniel H. Ragsdale
item.description: Former ICE Deputy Director (2012-2017) who joined GEO Group as EVP two months after leaving government. Now SVP for Contract Administration and Compliance at GEO.

item.title: Matthew T. Albence
item.description: Former Acting ICE Director (2019-2020) who joined GEO Group as SVP Client Relations. Known for calling family detention centers ‘more like summer camp.’ One of 6+ ex-ICE officials at GEO.
